rationale: The citing article is a broad conceptual editorial that narratively reviews decades of mitigation-related JMR work, so this 2019 empirical climate-media paper could be cited as one illustrative prior-study example rather than as a central method/theory source. Because the only matched evidence is a DOI-level reference entry (no in-text citation context or usage details), there is not enough evidence to safely classify it as clearly substantive or clearly incidental.
